view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for time-based membership is satisfied as per the evidence provided.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for time-based membership is satisfied as per the evidence provided.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement of a time-based membership (10 hours/week) through the use case description, which explicitly states that members have access for 10 hours per week and that the system tracks their usage. The scenario outlines that after using 7 hours, a notification is sent indicating remaining hours, and entry is denied after exceeding the limit, confirming the requirement is met. This is directly supported by the linked use case and the detailed behavior described within it.
